new_value: Implemented config validation per O2/R3: created internal/config/validate.go with schema validation (ranges, enums, min length) and semantic validation (ai_cmd_alias resolution). Collects all errors before reporting. Wired into LoadConfigWithProvenance and LoadConfigFromFileWithProvenance. Fixed overlay logic to detect explicit zero values using map-based presence detection. Verified with manual tests: multiple schema errors, semantic errors, valid config. All acceptance criteria met.

new_value: Completed: Implemented prompt input mode resolution per O1/R9. Created internal/prompt package with ResolveMode and LoadPrompt functions. Supports alias mode (config lookup), file mode (-f flag), and stdin mode (piped input). Validates all sources: missing files, unreadable files, empty content. Read-once semantics with in-memory buffering. Errors on ambiguous input (alias + file). Wired into run command. Verified: alias mode with config, file mode, stdin mode, missing file error, empty file error, unknown alias error, ambiguous input error. All acceptance criteria met.
